title: WKS Form
description: A Form.io-based form definition. Part of the WKS Case Configuration Standard. The component tree under `structure` is validated permissively (Form.io is an open component model); the WKS-specific `recordtype` extension is described in ext/form-recordtype.schema.json.

key.description: Unique form key, referenced by CaseDefinition.formKey.

_id.description: Storage envelope field. Not part of the logical config contract.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the WKS Case Configuration Standard this document conforms to. Absent/null is treated as the 1.0 baseline.

display.description: Render mode. The portal reads structure.display directly.

formComponent.description: A Form.io component. Validated permissively (Form.io is an open component model and real trees include typeless container/layout components). WKS adds a non-standard `recordtype` component (see ext/form-recordtype.schema.json) that the portal rewrites into a native select at load time.

type.description: Component type, e.g. textfield, textarea, number, datetime, select, checkbox, selectboxes, button, columns, panel, or the WKS extension 'recordtype'. Absent on container/layout wrappers.

columns.description: Columns layout; each column nests its own components.

customOptions.description: WKS recordtype extension config. See ext/form-recordtype.schema.json.
